name: openssh-server
description: Install Windows OpenSSH Server capability, set sshd Automatic, open TCP 22, allow password auth (matches mastw).
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${log}=Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\openssh-server-verify.log'; ${svc}=Get-Service -Name 'sshd' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (${svc} -and ${svc}.Status -eq 'Running') { Set-Content -Path ${log} -Value ('sshd Status=' + ${svc}.Status + ' StartType=' + ${svc}.StartType); Set-Content -Path (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\openssh-server-smoke.txt') -Value 'openssh_server_ok' } else { ('sshd not running or not registered') | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
